topWPAPlays.description: Sebastián Rivero grounds into a double play, second baseman Ernie Clement to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. Vaughn Grissom out at 2nd. Sebastián Rivero out at 1st.

Vaughn Grissom challenged (pitch result), call on the field was overturned: Vaughn Grissom walks. Jo Adell to 3rd. Yoán Moncada to 2nd.

Brent Rooker homers (5) on a fly ball to right field. Nick Kurtz scores. Shea Langeliers scores.

JJ Bleday flies out to center fielder Brice Matthews.

Brayan Rocchio grounds out, shortstop Brooks Lee to first baseman Kody Clemens.

Carson Kelly flies out to right fielder Brandon Nimmo.
Joc Pederson doubles (2) on a line drive to left fielder Ian Happ. Evan Carter scores.
Kyle Higashioka challenged (pitch result), call on the field was overturned: Seiya Suzuki called out on strikes.
Michael Massey homers (3) on a fly ball to right center field. Carter Jensen scores. Jac Caglianone scores.
Bobby Witt Jr. hits an inside-the-park home run (5) on a line drive down the right-field line. Maikel Garcia scores.

Jac Caglianone grounds into a double play, second baseman Zach McKinstry to first baseman Spencer Torkelson to shortstop Kevin McGonigle to catcher Jake Rogers. Vinnie Pasquantino out at home. Jac Caglianone out at 1st.
